=Module <<a_api_type subproject="server" | module Size >> =
<<pre class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|module>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Size>>>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|sig>><<a_api subproject="server" text=".." | module Size >><<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|end>>>>
----
